CREATE UNIQUE INDEX films_id_idx ON films (id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS s_idx ON films (revenue);
CREATE INDEX gy_idx ON films (genre, year);
CREATE INDEX i_index ON integers ((j + k));
CREATE INDEX idx_year ON films (year DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_composite ON films (genre, revenue, year);
CREATE INDEX idx_nested ON (SELECT id FROM films WHERE revenue > 1000);
CREATE INDEX idx_join ON (SELECT f.id FROM films f JOIN directors d ON f.director_id = d.id);
CREATE INDEX idx_partial ON films (id) WHERE revenue > 500;
CREATE INDEX idx_complex ON (SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM films WHERE genre = 'Action');
CREATE INDEX idx_with_default ON films (release_date DEFAULT NOW());
